name: No Bake Fudge Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, boil the sugar, milk, and butter over medium heat for one minute.
2. Add peanut butter and cocoa, and mix well with a wire whisk.
3. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla.
4. Gradually add quick oats until the mixture just holds its shape when dropped from a spoon. You may need to increase the amount of oats by up to 1/2 cup depending on your altitude and humidity.
5. Drop the mixture by teaspoonfuls or use a cookie scoop to place it onto cookie sheets lined with waxed paper.
6. Allow to cool before serving.
